error.message: Missing a Javadoc comment.
'member def type' has incorrect indentation level 4, expected level should be 2.
Each variable declaration must be in its own statement.
Member name 'a' must match pattern '^[a-z][a-z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]*$'.
Member name 'b' must match pattern '^[a-z][a-z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]*$'.
Member name 'c' must match pattern '^[a-z][a-z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]*$'.
'METHOD_DEF' should be separated from previous line.
'method def modifier' has incorrect indentation level 4, expected level should be 2.
Missing a Javadoc comment.
'method def' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
Each variable declaration must be in its own statement.
',' is preceded with whitespace.
'method def' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
'method def' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
'method def' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
'method def' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
'method def' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
'try' has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
'try' child has incorrect indentation level 12, expected level should be 6.
'try rcurly' has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
WhitespaceAround: '}' is not followed by whitespace. Empty blocks may only be represented as {} when not part of a multi-block statement (4.1.3)
WhitespaceAround: 'catch' is not preceded with whitespace.
WhitespaceAround: '{' is not preceded with whitespace.
'catch' child has incorrect indentation level 12, expected level should be 6.
'catch rcurly' has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
'method def' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
'method def' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.
'try' has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 4.

WhitespaceAround: 'catch' is not preceded with whitespace.

'catch' child has incorrect indentation level 12, expected level should be 6.
WhitespaceAround: '}' is not followed by whitespace. Empty blocks may only be represented as {} when not part of a multi-block statement (4.1.3)
'}' at column 9 should be alone on a line.

WhitespaceAround: '*' is not followed by whitespace. Empty blocks may only be represented as {} when not part of a multi-block statement (4.1.3)
WhitespaceAround: '*' is not preceded with whitespace.
